target: generate-html.js thesis-hero accessibility fixes: dark-mode badge hover contrast + aria-labelledby target heading role + structure regression tests

patches.description: ISS-1646/1707: Added @media(prefers-color-scheme:dark) override for .ds-thesis-badge:hover to set color:var(--bg) — fixes insufficient contrast in dark mode where badge background is dark and text was also dark on hover
ISS-1647/1708/1720: ds-thesis-statement paragraph — added role="heading" aria-level="1" so the aria-labelledby reference from the section points to a properly-typed heading element

tldr_evidence:
ISS-1646/1707: Dark-mode users saw poor contrast on badge hover because the hover rule only set background, not text color, and in dark mode the inherited text was near-black against a dark background. ISS-1647/1708/1720: aria-labelledby on the thesis hero section pointed to a

element with no explicit heading role; screen readers may not announce it as the section label.
tldr_verdict: PATCHED — both accessibility fixes applied; regression tests added in test.js (EXP-387 block); all 3616 tests pass.
